text_block_list.text:
I go looking for Mihono Bourbon after she
doesn't show up to training, and find her in the
cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Season to taste? How many milliliters of
seasoning is "to taste"?

text_block_list.name: Lunch Lady
text_block_list.text:
However much you think is tasty! Just put in as
much as you like.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... I have a report. I have confirmed that
the apple dish they serve at lunch helps me
recover from fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Believing that it would aid my future activities, I
examined the recipe, but I'm having trouble with
terms that frequently appear, like "to taste" and a
"pinch."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Such vague wording is synonymous with errors. I
can't make sense of this.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I decided to ask the person in charge of the
kitchen to help me confirm the exact amounts so
that I can focus on training instead.
choice_data_list: But you're already late for training, you know?
But you're already late for training, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My sincerest apologies. I was preoccupied with
the errors, and that has led to my own...
erroneous behavior...

She seems to regret her miscalculation, so I tell
her that she should rest today and we'll pick up
training tomorrow.
